talent_profile.bio:
If your inbox is out of control, your calendar is a mess, and you're still doing everything yourself - you're in the right place.
I'm Similoluwa Adejumo, an Executive Virtual Assistant with 2+ years of experience supporting Founders and CEOs who are too busy building great things to be buried in admin work.
I handle the back-end so you don't have to think about it. From managing high-volume inboxes and complex calendars to coordinating projects, setting appointments, and keeping your operations running smoothly, I make sure your business runs like you have a full team behind you, even when it's just me.
I work with tools like Google Workspace, Microsoft Teams, Slack, Asana, Trello, ClickUp, Notion, Calendly, and Zoom - so wherever your business lives, I can fit right in. I don't just complete tasks. I think ahead, spot problems before they happen, and build systems that make your day-to-day easier without you having to ask twice.
If you've been looking for someone you can actually hand things off to and trust, that's exactly what I'm here for.

talent_profile.bio:
I am a results-driven Project Manager and Product Owner with over 4 years of experience leading cross-functional software development teams and delivering high-impact digital products for international and local clients. My expertise spans SaaS, AI/ML, FinTech, LMS, and eCommerce domains, where I specialize in transforming complex business requirements into scalable, user-centric solutions.

I have successfully managed end-to-end project and product lifecycles, from discovery and planning to execution and delivery, while ensuring alignment between stakeholders, business goals, and technical teams. My core strengths include product strategy, backlog management, sprint planning, stakeholder communication, and process optimization.

Having collaborated with global clients across the USA, UAE, and enterprise-level organizations, I bring a strong understanding of agile methodologies, business analysis, and performance-driven delivery. I am particularly passionate about leveraging technology and AI to build innovative products that create real business value.

I thrive in fast-paced environments, take ownership of outcomes, and consistently focus on delivering projects on time, within scope, and with measurable impact.

talent_profile.bio: I turn difficult conversations into lasting relationships. Most people are good at either the people side or the admin side. I'm strong at both. With a background in counselling psychology and frontline client support across healthcare, education, and community settings, I specialize in client relations, query resolution, complaint handling, needs assessment, and remote administrative support. I've built rapport fast, handled sensitive cases with composure, and kept documentation tight, all at the same time. Bilingual in English and Swahili. Based in Nairobi, available worldwide. Open to remote Customer Support, VA, and Client Success roles. Let's connect.

IT Service Delivery | Managed Services | Global IT Operations | Infrastructure & Cloud Operations | ITIL v4 | SLA & KPI Management | P&L Governance | Vendor Management |  Digital Transformation | Stakeholder Management.

Highly-skilled Software Engineer and a certified scrum master with extensive experience managing 
information and communications technology for large organizations. Adept at assessing and implementing 
optimal technologies for improved operational systems. Accomplished planner with exceptional team 
leadership abilities to expertly direct high-performing ICT teams. I have great interest in building, thinking, 
seeking challenges and opportunities to leverage and I am excited to continue expanding my skillset, writing 
clean codes and removing impediments from teams.
I am a growth driven professional with a strong focus on project management with a foundation in problem solving

Detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with over 2 years of experience providing remote administrative, operational, and marketing support. Proficient in calendar and email management, documentation, data entry, reporting, lead tracking, and project coordination. Experienced with Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, Slack, ClickUp, Jira, and familiar with AI tools and time-tracking software. 
Reliable, organized, and fully available for full-time work in any time zone.

I'm a data analyst based in Ibadan, Nigeria, currently pursuing my M.Sc. in Data and Information Science at the University of Ibadan. That academic background means I bring both hands-on technical skills and a solid theoretical understanding of data to every project.
My technical stack covers the full analyst workflow, SQL (MySQL and PostgreSQL) for complex queries and analytical logic, Power BI with DAX for interactive dashboards and data modeling, Excel for pivot-driven reporting, and Python with pandas for data cleaning and exploratory analysis.
I've applied all of these on real projects, documented in my portfolio (https://sites.google.com/view/stephensdatadeck/home). Some highlights include a Walmart Retail Sales SQL Analysis, a Nigerian HR Employee Compensation study, a Customer Acquisition and Retention Power BI Dashboard, and a Nigerian Retail Sales Excel Dashboard. These projects involve window functions, chained CTEs, DAX measures, and clear data storytelling, the kind of work that drives actual business decisions.
Beyond the technical side, I've had real operational experience, quality review and data annotation at Clickworker, and CRM data processing with daily audit checks at Astro Marketer. I understand how data works end-to-end, not just at the dashboard level.
What makes me different? I communicate clearly, I don't oversell my skills, and I focus on giving you accurate, actionable insights, not just pretty charts.

talent_profile.bio:
I help businesses deliver seamless customer experiences and stay organised behind the scenes.

With 5+ years across financial services, nonprofit management, and consumer goods, I've supported teams, managed client relationships, and kept operations running smoothly, often across language and cultural lines. I'm fluent in English, French, and German, which means I can engage clients and handle documentation without things getting lost in translation.
Whether it's managing a busy inbox, coordinating projects, or being the calm voice a frustrated customer needs, I show up prepared and professional. I've worked with tools like Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, CRM systems, Trello, and Asana, and I'm comfortable picking up new ones quickly.

I'm based in Nigeria and available to work remotely across time zones.

talent_profile.bio: A meticulous and highly organized Chartered Accountant (ACA) with over six years of experience in bookkeeping, financial reporting, internal auditing, and risk management. Skilled in maintaining accurate records, reconciling accounts, managing invoicing and payments, and delivering precise financial insights to drive decision-making. I bring a strong command of QuickBooks, Zoho Books, Odoo, Excel automation, and financial systems, combined with analytical problem-solving and a focus on process efficiency. I am passionate about supporting business growth through accurate financial management, operational integrity, and proactive collaboration in a dynamic remote work environment.

talent_profile.bio:
I work as a Fractional CTO and Senior Technical Product & Project Manager, helping early-stage and growth-stage companies turn complex ideas into scalable, revenue-ready products—without the overhead of a full-time executive.

With 8+ years of experience, I sit at the intersection of product strategy, technical execution, and delivery leadership, supporting SaaS, AI, eCommerce, and Web3 platforms built by distributed teams across the U.S., Canada, and Europe.

My background as a hands-on web and mobile developer allows me to operate comfortably across:

System architecture and API ecosystems
Cloud platforms, CI/CD pipelines, and release automation
AI / LLM-powered product features and integrations

This enables me to translate business goals into clear product roadmaps, reduce engineering friction, and drive faster, more predictable delivery.

Across engagements, I’ve:

Led product discovery, roadmap planning, and execution for production-grade SaaS platforms used by thousands of customers
Integrated payment gateways, loyalty engines, analytics dashboards, and AI-driven communication modules
Improved delivery velocity through Agile practices, automation, and cross-functional alignment
Managed and scaled remote engineering and product teams across multiple time zones, ensuring transparency and stakeholder confidence
Founders typically bring me in when they need:

A technical product leader who can make informed architecture and delivery decisions
A Technical PM to bring structure, timelines, and accountability to engineering teams
A Product Manager who balances user needs, business goals, and technical feasibility

Fractional CTO-level guidance during growth, refactors, or platform scaling

I enjoy working where product decisions directly influence growth, customer experience, and revenue, and I’m continuously exploring how AI, emerging technologies, and platform integrations can unlock new value.

📍 Available for Fractional CTO, Technical PM, or Product Leadership engagements with U.S. companies
⏰ 4–6 hours overlap with ET/PT

I’m a Senior Accountant with over 6 years of experience in full-cycle accounting, supporting organizations with accurate, audit-ready financial reporting and efficient financial operations. I’ve worked across healthcare and service-based industries, managing end-to-end processes including accounts payable and receivable, payroll, reconciliations, and month-end close. I also prepare and analyze financial statements—profit and loss, balance sheet, and cash flow—to support business decision-making.

From a tools and systems perspective, I’m highly proficient in QuickBooks Online, with additional experience in Xero and Zoho Books. I use Microsoft Excel at an advanced level for data analysis, reconciliations, and reporting, including pivot tables and financial modeling, and I’m comfortable working with cloud-based ERP systems. I also collaborate using tools like Google Workspace, Slack, Zoom, and Microsoft Teams, and I’m quick to learn new platforms when needed.

What makes me unique is my ability to combine accuracy with process improvement. I don’t just maintain financial records—I actively look for ways to make systems more efficient and reliable. For example, I’ve reduced payment processing time by 30%, improved collections by 25%, and reduced late supplier payments by 40% by optimizing workflows and strengthening controls.

I’m also very detail-oriented and proactive, with a strong focus on maintaining clean books, resolving discrepancies quickly, and communicating clearly with clients. Having worked in remote environments, I’m highly reliable, self-managed, and comfortable supporting teams across different time zones.

Overall, I bring a balance of technical expertise, efficiency, and accountability, and I’m focused on delivering high-quality financial work that clients can trust.

I am a results-driven Project Manager with over six years of experience delivering large-scale telecommunications infrastructure projects across Nigeria. I specialize in end-to-end project delivery, spanning initiation, planning, execution, and closure while ensuring alignment with business objectives, timelines, and budget constraints.

I bring strong capabilities in stakeholder management, cross-functional team coordination, risk mitigation, and process optimization.

With a solid foundation in both Agile and Waterfall methodologies, I am adept at adapting delivery approaches to suit project complexity and client needs. My background in Telecommunication and solar energy engineering also gives me a unique perspective on infrastructure sustainability and innovation.

What sets me apart is my ability to translate complex technical requirements into actionable plans, maintain clear communication with stakeholders, and consistently deliver high-impact results in fast-paced environments.

Businesses don’t just lose customers because of bad products — they lose them because of slow responses, disorganized systems, and poor communication.

I help businesses solve that by providing reliable customer support and structured operational assistance that keeps clients satisfied and daily operations running smoothly.

I’m a Customer Support Specialist with over 3 years of experience supporting customers, executives, and remote teams through clear communication, fast problem resolution, and organized backend support.

Over the years, I have worked in remote customer support roles handling inbound and outbound communication, assisting customers with inquiries, documenting interactions, and ensuring issues are resolved efficiently while maintaining a positive customer experience.

I have over ten years of progressive experience across audit, assurance, and financial management functions — including current responsibilities as Manager, Consolidation and Statutory Reporting (West Africa Cluster) at SPIRO Mobility Solutions — I bring a proven ability to manage complex financial operations, cross-border reporting, and strategic banking relationships across multiple African markets.
My professional background spans leading global audit and consulting firms — KPMG, EY, and Mazars — where I managed audit engagements across sectors such as energy, consumer goods, and manufacturing. This foundation provided me with a deep understanding of IFRS, US GAAP, tax compliance, and risk management frameworks. At SPIRO, I have built on that technical base by leading financial operations across eight West African countries (Ghana, Nigeria, Benin, Senegal, Ivory Coast, Angola, Gabon, and Togo).
In this role, I oversee regional budgeting, SAP implementation, statutory audits, and intercompany reconciliations. I also manage partnerships with regional banking institutions to streamline payment processing, treasury operations, and foreign exchange management — ensuring liquidity optimization and accurate reconciliation across multi-currency accounts. This experience has sharpened my ability to translate financial data into strategic insight while maintaining operational integrity across borders.
I am currently pursuing an MBA in Accounting and Finance to deepen my strategic and leadership competencies. My goal is to continue delivering value by driving financial excellence, optimizing control environments, and fostering sustainable partnerships that strengthen the organization’s footprint in Africa.
I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my regional experience, audit rigor, and strategic financial leadership can contribute to your team’s success.
Thank you for considering my application.

I'm a Product Manager with 3+ years of experience building and shipping digital products across fintech, EdTech, and IT services. I've owned products end-to-end, from the early discovery stage where you're still figuring out what to build and why, all the way through to launch and iteration. My work has delivered real outcomes: an 80% increase in user conversion, 20% revenue growth, and a 25% improvement in delivery speed across teams.
I work closely with engineers and designers, write clear specs, manage backlogs in Jira, and run Scrum ceremonies that actually keep teams aligned rather than just filling up calendars. I'm technically fluent enough to have meaningful conversations with engineers.
What makes me different is that I don't just manage delivery, I care about solving the right problem first. I ask a lot of questions, stay close to the detail, and make decisions grounded in user behavior and data rather than assumptions.
Tools I work with regularly: Notion, Jira, Asana, ClickUp, Figma, Miro, Postman, Google Workspace, Slack, and Microsoft Clarity.

I am a business management professional with 4+ years in customer support, operations management and administrative support. I thrive in fast-paced, target-driven environments where responsiveness and customer retention are essential. I am skilled in managing a high volume of customer interactions via phone, email, and chat, consistently meeting KPIs for response time, quality, and satisfaction, resolving customer issues including account updates, service requests, complaints, and escalations promptly while demonstrating empathy and clear communication to ensure I build strong customer relationships. I am detail-oriented in documenting cases and maintaining accurate records in CRM systems. I take pride in following processes and identifying opportunities to improve efficiency. I also have supported office operations by coordinating teams and identifying recurring issues to improve processes.

talent_profile.bio:
A proactive and detail-oriented Tax & Financial Associate with progressive experience in tax compliance, 
advisory, audit support, financial reporting, and account reconciliation across multiple industries, 
including experience working with and managing tax compliance engagements for multinational 
corporations. Adept at preparing and filing statutory tax returns, reconciling accounts, and ensuring timely 
settlement of liabilities in line with regulatory requirements. Experienced in liaising with tax authorities, 
supporting audits, and delivering accurate financial documentation for decision-making. Recognised for 
strong analytical ability, stakeholder engagement, and a commitment to accuracy, efficiency, and 
continuous professional development.

Accounting professional with 5 years of experience working with UK and US-based companies. Skilled in full-cycle
bookkeeping, financial reporting, reconciliations, and proficient in tools such as Xero, QuickBooks, Zoho Books, Sage
500, and ClearBooks. Holds a master’s degree in accounting and finance from Russia, with a strong foundation in
international accounting standards. Seeking full-time opportunities to contribute precise and dependable financial
expertise to dynamic organizations.

talent_profile.bio:
With over 10+ years’ experience supporting senior leaders, owners, and management teams within professional services, consulting, and corporate environments, I bring a strong foundation in governance, confidentiality, and operational excellence. My HR background enables me to anticipate executive needs, manage sensitive information with discretion, and support informed decision-making at executive and board level.

I am highly organised, proactive, and detail-driven, with particular strength in establishing effective systems, processes, and operational structures that support executive and team efficiency. I specialise in streamlining administrative workflows, improving consistency, and using technology and AI tools to automate tasks, reduce manual effort, and create scalable ways of working. I am trusted for bringing order, clarity, and reliability to busy environments through well-designed systems rather than ad hoc administration.
